headline: Assessing KeyCorp (KEY) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Mixed Sentiment
summary: KeyCorp (KEY) has been drawing attention after recent share price weakness, with the stock showing negative returns over the past month and past 3 months, while still carrying a relatively high 1 year total return. See our latest analysis for KeyCorp. Recent weakness in the share price, with a 30 day share price return of 6.46% and year to date share price return of 7.53% declines, contrasts with the 1 year total shareholder return of 26.88%. This suggests fading short term momentum after...

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on KeyCorp, Lowers Price Target to $24
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Manan Gosalia   maintains KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $26 to $24.

headline: Northeast Ohio Business Owner Avoids $5,000 Loss Thanks to KeyBank Fraud-Prevention Program
summary: Carol Abbot shared her experience during a recent fraud workshop NORTHAMPTON, MA / ACCESS Newswire / March 31, 2026 / A Northeast Ohio restaurant owner and KeyBank client recently avoided a nearly $5,000 loss thanks to KeyBank's Positive Pay fraud‑prevention ...
